channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Indian immigrant religion 2012
item.description: Source: TW 5 facts about Indian Americans Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi received a rapturous reception in New York City on Sunday, speaking to more than 19,000 people — largely Indian Americans, according to The New York Times — at Madison Square Garden. During his packed five-day visit, Modi also addressed the UN General Assembly and met with a bevy of U.S. business leaders Monday morning before heading to an “intimate dinner” with President Obama.

item.title: US stats
item.description: Really interesting data from America. 60% Black and 21% White American mothers were unmarried when they delivered, i.e - they were having a kid out of wedlock. But only 1.7% of Indian mothers in the USA were unmarried, meaning they only had children within marriage. Indian women in America also had the lowest rates for any ethnoracial group of maternal smoking before childbirth (0.1%). White & Native American women had the highest rates!
